arts.ttl: Mike Phelan Names Sir Alex Ferguson’s 5 Best Man United Signings
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney and Cristiano Ronaldo both feature as the former assistant manager named Ferguson's best signings.

arts.ttl: Denis Law tribute: Fabian Hurzeler and Danny Welbeck embrace Sir Alex Ferguson after emotional scenes at Old Trafford
arts.sum: Brighton’s Fabian Hurzeler and Danny Welbeck embraced Sir Alex Ferguson after an emotional tribute to the late Denis Law at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Man Utd pay emotional tribute to legend Law
arts.sum: Manchester United fans pay an emotional tribute to former striker Denis Law - who died on Friday at the age of 84 - before their match against Brighton.

arts.ttl: Discarded Man Utd duo show up Ruben Amorim as Red Devils woes worsen
arts.sum: Manchester United fans would be forgiven for not recognising two of their former assets, who have each taken their game to different levels since joining their newest club

arts.ttl: Denis Law was ‘cornerstone’ of Manchester United success – Sir Alex Ferguson
arts.sum: Law won two league titles with United and was a member of their European Cup-winning team under Sir Matt Busby in 1968.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains why he has made three changes to his Manchester United XI vs Brighton
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim has made a few tweaks for the visit of Brighton & Hove Albion to Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Kevin Palmer: Roy Keane missed the point on Bruno Fernandes - like it or not, he’s a captain for the TikTok generation
arts.sum: Times have changed at all levels of society and current United captain Bruno Fernandes is an example of what a Premier League captain now looks like. So maybe the constant criticism of Fernandes at United has actually missed the more pertinent point that he is a classic example of how the captaincy role has evolved.

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson pays his personal tribute to the late Denis Law
arts.sum: The interesting thing is why do they call him 'The King' because they had George Best and Bobby Charlton, the greatest English player of all time. He was a fantastic player for this club but they called Denis 'The King'.

arts.ttl: Brighton midfielder absent from squad to face Manchester United as he finalises January transfer
arts.sum: Brighton midfielder Jakub Moder is not in the squad picked to face Manchester United, as he finalises his move away from the club.

arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund 'could follow Jadon Sancho blueprint' to land Man United star Marcus Rashford
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund allegedly continue to hold talks with Manchester United over a loan deal for unsettled forward Marcus Rashford.
